requirement_topic.en: Market access package: Thai importer/licence holder, labelling, and energy-efficiency obligations
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入：泰国进口商/许可持有人、标签与能效要求
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入：泰國進口商/許可持有人、標籤與能效要求

summary.en: The import side in Thailand is importer-led. A licensed in-country importer or equivalent legal holder typically manages customs, documentation, and compliance responsibility before distribution. Energy-related products are also affected by domestic energy labelling expectations, including EGAT Energy Label No.5 and DEDE MEPS-style controls where applicable. Customs routing and importer handover commonly use Laem Chabang and Bangkok as key entry points.
summary.zh: 泰国市场准入以进口方为主导。通常由有许可的境内进口商或等效法定主体承担清关、文件提交及合规责任。涉及能效类别的产品还需关注EGAT能源标识No.5及DEDE MEPS类控制要求。清关和进口方交接通常以洛美占和曼谷港口为主要入口。
summary.zht: 泰國市場准入以進口方為主導。通常由有許可的境內進口商或等效法定主體承擔清關、文件提交及合規責任。涉及能效類別的產品還需關注EGAT能源標識No.5及DEDE MEPS類控制要求。清關和進口方交接通常以洛美占和曼谷港口為主要入口。

standards_or_laws: Thai customs and importer licensing coordination requirements published by relevant Thai ministries
DEDE MEPS obligations for relevant electrical product classes

summary.en: China's export compliance typically centers on domestic GB/CCC filing, CNCA or MIIT related declarations, and Chinese customs export controls. China has domestic energy-label systems for local markets but does not impose Thailand-specific in-country importer/licence-holder obligations for Chinese export lots in the same structure.
summary.zh: 中国出口合规主要聚焦于国内GB/CCC申报、CNCA或工信部相关义务及中国海关出口管理。中国虽有本地能效标签体系，但通常不以泰国式境内进口商许可人模式要求同一批中国出口。故两地在市场准入闭环责任上存在结构差异。
summary.zht: 中國出口合規主要聚焦於國內GB/CCC申報、CNCA或工信部相關義務及中國海關出口管理。中國雖有本地能效標籤體系，但通常不以泰國式境內進口商許可人模式要求同一批中國出口。故兩地在市場准入閉環責任上存在結構性差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — lithium battery safety base requirements
GB 9254-2017 and related electrical safety/EMC references

gap.en: Main gaps are organisational and documentary. China-side export packets usually do not establish a Thai-legal importer/ license-holder chain for in-market accountability. Thai port entry and post-entry enforcement contexts also attach local language and format requirements to labels and declarations. Exporters should budget for local representative support, Thai documentation, and product labeling alignment.
gap.zh: 主要差距是组织与文档闭环。中国的出口文件通常不能直接建立泰国市场所需的进口商/许可人责任链。泰国口岸与后续监管也会对标签和申报材料的本地化格式提出要求。出口商需预留本地合作方支持、泰语文件与标签对齐成本。
gap.zht: 主要差距是組織與文件閉環。中國的出口文件通常不能直接建立泰國市場所需的進口商/許可人責任鏈。泰國口岸與後續監管也會對標籤和申報材料的本地化格式提出要求。出口商需預留本地合作方支持、泰文文件與標籤對齊成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for Thai placement where the product category is controlled or energy-efficiency reporting applies.
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as a one-to-one legal equivalent; Chinese systems establish domestic import/export accountability in a different legal structure.

source.publisher: Thai Ministry of Finance / Customs Department (market access and import administration context)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access planning for Thailand requires more than product test evidence. Verify importer license status, prepare Thai-market labeling and energy declarations, and pre-align customs routing through Laem Chabang or Bangkok for realistic lead-time planning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国入市不仅是测试证据问题。应先确认进口商许可状态，准备泰国标签与能效材料，并基于洛美占或曼谷港口安排清关和时效预案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國入市不僅是測試證據問題。應先確認進口商許可狀態，準備泰國標籤與能效材料，並基於洛美占或曼谷港口安排清關與時效預案。
